Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi is pleased to declare that the areas of villages mentioned in column 3 of the Schedule below and falling in the revenue estate / zone mentioned in column 1, hitherto part of the rural areas, shall, cease to be the rural areas and shall be deemed as Urban areas, namely:- SCHEDULE Planning Zone 1 Zone ‘K-I’ 5 No. S/No. 2 1 Name of village North DMC – 50 Villages 3 Kamruddin Nagar Particulars of the Area Urbanised 4 The old abadis as well as the entire Revenue Estate of the said village declared as Urban -- 3 of 5 -- 4 DELHI GAZETTE :
